title: lespedeza × manniana
intro: Lespedeza × manniana, also known as Japanese clover or bush clover, is a perennial legume plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of menopause, menstrual cramps, and other gynecological issues. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving immune function, and supporting bone health. Lespedeza × manniana can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or powder, making it a versatile ingredient in herbal medicine.
